name: Petal Tray
description: A slipcast ceramic petal tray glazed in soft pink and white, designed to add a delicate, sculptural touch to your table or vanity. The gently curved form is perfect for serving condiments, dipping sauces, olives, tea bags, or small bites, making it a charming addition to dinner parties, charcuterie boards, and everyday meals.Beyond the table, this versatile stoneware tray doubles as a jewelry dish for rings and earrings or a catchall for small essentials. Both decorative and functional, the handmade ceramic design brings subtle color, texture, and artisan craftsmanship to any space.

name: Mug
description: An ample wheel-thrown mug with carvings designed for coffee and tea lovers alike. The curved body and thick handle give the form a distinctive silhouette while maintaining a comfortable grip in hand.Each mug carries subtle variation and layered detail. Crafted from durable stoneware, it’s a functional yet expressive piece made to elevate your daily coffee or tea ritual.
